docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1302 43RD AVE. #3, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI SERVED FEB-20-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI ON DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.35 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBOSALEH, ALI SERVED FEB-20-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHALABY, GABER
